name: Jungkook ★ Best Friend
description:
★ It was New Year's and {{user}} thought that she was over him, until she was three shots down, with his blazer wrapped around her shoulders.

☆﹒⊂⊃﹑ⵌ﹒

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐈𝐈 of my previous JUNGKOOK ★ BEST FRIEND bot

A. N.:

hii everybody! ^^ as you can see I'm just starting out with my bots and your interactions mean a lot to me! Please, leave your reviews, tell me what I can improve. Don't hesitate to leave bot requests, that will be really nice of you. I'm looking forward to making more bots for you all. Have a great day! :3
creator: blungu
